minCapacity.description: Lower bound on number of Application Gateway capacity.

maxCapacity.description: Upper bound on number of Application Gateway capacity.

name.description: The name of the backend address pool.

workloadIds.description: ARM resource IDs of the backend targets (VMs, VMSS instances, or App Services) in this pool.

name.description: The name of the backend settings.

port.description: The destination port on the backend.

protocol.description: The protocol used to communicate with the backend.

requestTimeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. Acceptable values are from 1 second to 86400 seconds.

hostName.description: Host header to be sent to the backend servers.

name.description: The name of the frontend IP configuration.

type.description: The type of the frontend IP configuration indicating public or private.

publicIpName.description: The name of the public IP resource associated with this frontend IP configuration. Applicable for public frontends.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the frontend IP configuration. For public frontends this is the public IP; for private frontends this is the private IP allocated from the application gateway's dedicated subnet.

name.description: The name of the health probe.

protocol.description: The protocol used for the probe.

host.description: Host name to send the probe to.

path.description: Relative path of the probe. Valid path starts from '/'.

port.description: Custom port used for probing the backend servers.

cores.description: Gets the Compute Size in vCores.

Gets the Available vCores. This can be less than the vCores in the Constrained
vCPU VM Sizes.

subscriptionId.description: Gets or sets the subscription ID for licensing program selected.

costDetail.description: The sku cost details per azure offer type.

numberOfWebApps.description: Gets or sets the number of web apps.

numberOfMachines.description: Gets or sets the number of machines.

DownloadUrl.description: Data model of Download URL for assessment report.

protocol.description: The transport protocol used by the inbound NAT rule.

targetType.description: The target type of the inbound NAT rule indicating whether it targets a specific VM or a backend address pool.

frontendIpConfiguration.description: The frontend IP configuration associated with this rule.

frontendPort.description: The port for the external endpoint. Port numbers for each rule must be unique within the Load Balancer.

frontendPortRangeStart.description: The port range start for the external endpoint. Applicable when target type is BackendPool.

frontendPortRangeEnd.description: The port range end for the external endpoint. Applicable when target type is BackendPool.

backendPort.description: The port used for the internal endpoint.

targetVirtualMachine.description: The name of the target virtual machine. Applicable when target type is AzureVm.

backendPool.description: The backend address pool associated with this rule. Applicable when target type is BackendPool.

idleTimeoutInMinutes.description: The timeout for the TCP idle connection in minutes. The value can be set between 4 and 30 minutes.

enableFloatingIp.description: Configures a virtual machine's endpoint for the floating IP capability required to configure a SQL AlwaysOn Availability Group.

enableTcpReset.description: Receive bidirectional TCP Reset on TCP flow idle timeout or unexpected connection termination.

InboundNatRuleTargetType.description: The target type of an inbound NAT rule.

values.name: AzureVm
values.description: The rule targets a specific Azure virtual machine.

values.description: The rule targets a backend address pool.

name.description: The name of the backend address pool.

memberResourceIds.description: The resource IDs of the backend pool members (VMs, VMSS instances, or IP addresses).

LbFrontendIpConfig.description: Load balancer frontend IP configuration details.

name.description: The name of the frontend IP configuration.

virtualNetwork.description: The virtual network associated with the frontend IP configuration. Applicable for internal load balancers.

ipAddress.description: The IP address of the frontend IP configuration in IPv4 or IPv6 format.

ipAllocationMethod.description: The private IP address allocation method.

name.description: The name of the health check.

protocol.description: The protocol of the health check.

port.description: The port for communicating the health check.

requestPath.description: The URI used for requesting health status from the VM.

intervalInSeconds.description: The interval, in seconds, for how frequently to probe the endpoint for health status.

numberOfProbes.description: The number of probes where if no response, will result in stopping further traffic from being delivered to the endpoint.

probeThreshold.description: The number of consecutive successful or failed probes in order to allow or deny traffic from being delivered to this endpoint.

name.description: The name of the outbound rule.

protocol.description: The protocol for the outbound rule.

frontendIpConfigurations.description: The frontend IP configurations associated with this outbound rule.

backendAddressPool.description: The backend address pool associated with this outbound rule.

allocatedOutboundPorts.description: The number of outbound ports to be used for NAT.

idleTimeoutInMinutes.description: The timeout for the TCP idle connection in minutes.

enableTcpReset.description: Receive bidirectional TCP Reset on TCP flow idle timeout or unexpected connection termination.

LbProbeProtocol.description: Protocol of the load balancer health probe.

protocol.description: The transport protocol used by the load balancing rule.

frontendIpConfiguration.description: The frontend IP configuration associated with this rule.

frontendPort.description: The port for the external endpoint. Port numbers for each rule must be unique within the Load Balancer.

backendPort.description: The port used for internal connections on the endpoint.

backendPool.description: The backend address pool associated with this rule.

healthProbe.description: The health probe associated with this rule.

enableFloatingIp.description: Configures a virtual machine's endpoint for the floating IP capability.

enableTcpReset.description: Receive bidirectional TCP Reset on TCP flow idle timeout or unexpected connection termination.

values.description: Topology migration guideline related to regional resiliency.

mimicOnPremNetwork.description: Whether to mimic the on-premises network topology.

useWafAndCafForNetworkDesign.description: Whether to use WAF and CAF guidelines for network design.

includePlatformNetworkComponents.description: Whether to include platform network components.

migrationGuidelines.description: Gets the list of migration guidelines applicable to this target.

recommendationReasonings.description: Gets the list of recommendation reasonings.

networkResourcesSummary.description: Gets the summary of recommended network resources and their counts.

customRuleCount.description: The total number of custom security rules in this network security group.

defaultRuleCount.description: The total number of default security rules in this network security group.

associatedSubnetCount.description: The number of subnets associated with this network security group.

associatedNicCount.description: The number of network interfaces associated with this network security group.

NsgRuleExtendedDetails.description: Network security group rule extended details.

protocol.description: Network protocol this rule applies to.

sourcePortRanges.description: The source port ranges. Asterisk '*' can be used to match all ports.

destinationPortRanges.description: The destination port ranges. Asterisk '*' can be used to match all ports.

sourceAddressPrefixes.description: The source address prefixes. CIDR, IP ranges, or default tags such as 'VirtualNetwork', 'AzureLoadBalancer', 'Internet'. Asterisk '*' matches all.

destinationAddressPrefixes.description: The destination address prefixes. CIDR, IP ranges, or default tags such as 'VirtualNetwork', 'AzureLoadBalancer', 'Internet'. Asterisk '*' matches all.

action.description: Whether network traffic is allowed or denied.

priority.description: The priority of the rule. The value can be between 100 and 4096. The lower the priority number, the higher the priority of the rule.

direction.description: The direction of the rule. Specifies if rule will be evaluated on incoming or outgoing traffic.

isDefaultRule.description: Whether this is a default security rule or a custom security rule.

NsgSecurityRuleAccess.description: Whether network traffic is allowed or denied.

NsgSecurityRuleDirection.description: The direction of the rule. Specifies if rule will be evaluated on incoming or outgoing traffic.

NsgSecurityRuleProtocol.description: Network protocol this rule applies to.

percentile.description:
Percentile of the utilization data values to be considered while assessing
machines.

timeRange.description:
Time Range for which the historic utilization data should be considered for
assessment.

perfDataStartTime.description: Gets or sets the start time to consider performance data for assessment.

perfDataEndTime.description: Gets or sets the end time to consider performance data for assessment.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

createdTimestamp.description: Time when this project was created. Date-Time represented in ISO-8601 format.

updatedTimestamp.description:
Time when this project was last updated. Date-Time represented in ISO-8601
format.

serviceEndpoint.description: Endpoint at which the collector agent can call agent REST API.

assessmentSolutionId.description: Assessment solution ARM id tracked by Microsoft.Migrate/migrateProjects.

customerWorkspaceId.description: The ARM id of service map workspace created by customer.

customerWorkspaceLocation.description: Location of service map workspace created by customer.

publicNetworkAccess.description:
This value can be set to 'enabled' to avoid breaking changes on existing
customer resources and templates. If set to 'disabled', traffic over public
interface is not allowed, and private endpoint connections would be the
exclusive access method.

privateEndpointConnections.description: The list of private endpoint connections to the project.

customerStorageAccountArmId.description:
The Azure resource id of the storage account used for interactions when public access is
disabled.

serverGroupId.description: The server group Azure resource id.

numberOfMounts.description: Gets number of mounts of shared disks.

count.description: The count of a type of source.
